headline: Trump Accounts Bring Windfall for Babies — and Also This One Fund
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Whether you admire him or cringe at the mention of his name, US President Donald Trump has long had a penchant for putting his name on things. Once it was condos, steaks and Bibles. More recently, it’s been Trump Gold Cards, Trump IRAs (coming next year) and, as of this month, Trump Accounts. The newest addition is a government-funded savings program that gives eligible newborn Americans $1,000 to begin building wealth from birth. Parents and other eligible contributors can give u

headline: Our Top 10 High Growth Dividend Stocks - July 2026
summary: We share our methodology for selecting high-growth dividend-paying stocks, focusing on dividend growth and sustainability rather than high current yield. Read the full list of picks here.
